mnemonics: Cities are like addresses, use the address to find the city
keyPoints: Use the MongoDB Query Language (MQL) to find a city by its name
The $regex operator is used for pattern matching, e.g. / City / for whole word match
Use the db.collection.createIndex() method to create an index on the city field
Log the index created using the db.collection.indexes().find() method and logging to the console or a file
When creating an index, specify the options: {name: 'myIndex', unique: false, text: true, sparse: false, max: 1024, background: true}
